project.title: OGDH/DHTKD1-DLST (E1o/E1a- E2o) CL-MS
project.projectDescription: human OGDH (E1o) and DHTKD1 (E1a) were cross-linked with DLST (E2o). The samples were analyzed by LC-MS/MS in order to elucidate the interaction sites between these two E1-E2 subcomplexes.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: The human E1a or E1o (1 nmol, 33 µM subunits) and E2o (1 nmol, 33 µM subunits) in buffer containing 20 mM K2HPO4 (pH 7.5) containing 0.5 mM ThDP, 1 mM MgCl2, 0.15 M NaCl and 10% glycerol. After 30 min of incubation at 20 °C, 1 µl of CDI (1 M) or DSBU (150 mM) dissolved in DMSO was added and the cross-linking reaction was conducted at 15 °C for 45 min. To quench the reaction, the reaction mixture was diluted to 50 µl with reaction buffer above, and 1 M Tris.HCl (pH 8.0) was added to a final concentration of 20 mM. Cross-linked samples were subjected to tryptic and Glu-C in-solution double digestion. Digested samples were desalted on a SepPak SPE C-18 column and were dried using a SpeedVac centrifuge (Savant), then dissolved in 100 µl of 20% acetonitrile (0.05% formic acid).  Peptide enrichment was carried out by using a SCX trap cartridge. The enriched peptides were desalted by a SepPak SPE C-18 column and were dried using a SpeedVac centrifuge. Cross-linked peptides were analyzed by nano-LC-MS/MS
project.dataProcessingProtocol: LC-MS/MS peak lists were generated using the ProteoWizard 3.0.18156 and searched against the Swissprot database (proteome ID: UP000000558, search was done by using searchGUI-3.3.117 incorporated with peptideshaker 1.16.42).Cross-links were evaluated using software tool Merox 1.6.6 with the following parameters: precursor 5 ppm; fragment 15 ppm mass accuracy; CDI or BuUrBu set as cross-linker. The cross-linked peptides were manually validated, the results with FDR < 0.01 limit were exported.

experimentTypes.name: Chemical cross-linking coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

references.referenceLine: Nemeria NS, Zhang X, Leandro J, Zhou J, Yang L, Houten SM, Jordan F. Toward an Understanding of the Structural and Mechanistic Aspects of Protein-Protein Interactions in 2-Oxoacid Dehydrogenase Complexes. Life (Basel). 2021 11(5)
